title: CCP-12 synchronized hopping definition needed
description: Context unclear on exact requirements for synchronized hopping in CCP-12 (bead project-LICHEN-da2q.12). Current impl in spec/02a and ccp16.json uses select_channel with fnv1a32 on (eui64 ^ t ^ epoch). Is this it, or separate time-synced hop sequence, rendezvous channel in announce, or priority selection? Also, ccp13_vectors undefined in generate.py from prior chunk on CCP-13.4. HUMAN review required before implementing in Zephyr/Rust per scope. Will address existing codereview-P1 kb8d after clarification.
